pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh (TARGET_PORTFOLIO_DIR) both explicitly specify this portfolio name.
Task description and setup_task.sh (which injects exactly these 5 symbols into realtimestock.csv) confirm these are the expected stocks.
Task description explicitly states 'at a price of $150.00'.

setup_task.sh and export_result.sh use JSTOCK_DATA_DIR='/home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState' and TARGET_PORTFOLIO_DIR='${JSTOCK_DATA_DIR}/portfolios/Starter_Positions', and TARGET_CSV='${TARGET_PORTFOLIO_DIR}/buyportfolio.csv', which perfectly matches this relative path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically injected watchlist data in JStock. The target portfolio name 'Starter_Positions', the expected stock symbols (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA), unit quantity (1.0), and price ($150.0) are all explicitly defined in the task description and setup/export scripts. The expected relative path for the generated portfolio file is verified as '.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/portfolios/Starter_Positions/buyportfolio.csv' based on the environment export scripts.
